joke: Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
Why don't skeletons fight each other? They don't have the guts!
Why did the bicycle fall over? Because it was two tired!
Why did the tomato turn red? Because it saw the salad dressing!
Why did the golfer bring two pairs of pants? In case he got a hole in one!
Why did the man throw his clock out the window? He wanted to see time fly!
Why did the photo go to jail? Because it was framed!
Why did the banker quit his job? He lost interest!
Why did the boy bring a ladder to school? Because he wanted to go to high school!
Why did the computer get cold? Because it left its Windows open!
Why was the belt arrested? Because it held up a pair of pants!
Why did the man run around his bed? Because he wanted to catch up on his sleep!
Why did the invisible man turn down the job offer? He couldn't see himself doing it!
Why can't you play cards in the jungle? Too many cheetahs!
Why did the singer need a ladder? To reach the high notes!
Why is 6 afraid of 7? Because 7 8 9!
Why did the traffic light turn red? You would too if you had to change in the middle of the street!
Why did they put a fence around the cemetery? Because people are dying to get in!
Why can't a nose be 12 inches long? Because then it would be a foot!
Why did the actor fall through the floorboards? Because it was just a stage he was going through!
Why is tennis the noisiest sport? Because of all the rackets!
Why was the elevator so angry? Because people kept pushing its buttons!
Why did the thief take a bath? He wanted to make a clean getaway!
Why was the library so tall? Because it had so many stories!
Why did the astronaut break up with his girlfriend? Because he needed space!
Why shouldn't you trust stairs? Because they're always up to something!
Why shouldn't you write with a broken pencil? Because it's pointless!
Why did the cloud stay home? It was under the weather!
Why did the cell phone need glasses? Because it lost its contacts!
